name: python-library
label: Python Library
description: Python package or library intended for distribution or internal reuse.
profile_description: Local development, testing, and CI. No GPU required.
run_context_additions: - Lint and format: `ruff check . && ruff format .`
workflow_notes: Public API changes require a version bump — treat the public surface as a contract.
Every new function or class needs a corresponding test.
Use `episteme worktree feat/<name>` for any non-trivial feature branch.
Keep the `CHANGELOG` or release notes current.

Config discipline: collect tunable defaults into one config module (env-overridable, resolved at call time, argparse-wired for CLIs); classify before centralizing — some values stay coupled or frozen deliberately, record why.
Hard-pin dependencies only where a known incompatibility exists; every pin carries its reason in a comment.
safety_notes: Never publish to PyPI without passing a review gate.
Keep credentials and API keys out of the package and its tests.
Audit dependencies before adding new ones — supply chain risk applies.
